name_en: ❤️B's latest tote bag, crafted from calfskin suede. Hand-finished in an Italian workshop with matching lining. Features the iconic B-shaped closure, smooth calfskin trim, and top handle. Includes a detachable leather shoulder strap for easy switching between handbag and shoulder bag styles.
name_cn:
❤️B's latest tote bag, crafted from calfskin suede. Hand-finished in an Italian workshop with matching lining. Features the iconic B-shaped closure, smooth calfskin trim, and top handle. Includes a detachable leather shoulder strap for easy switching between handbag and shoulder bag styles.
Back features embossed equestrian knight logo (EKD)
Size 30 × 13 × 24cm
